rationale: Both reviews identify the same real api-design flaws grounded in the diff (tautological curvature theorem exporting its own hypothesis; vacuous IsCompactOrientedManifold.oriented : True; duplicate public uniform_boundedness_principle alias for banach_steinhaus). Acting on either produces the identical outcome of removing/replacing those declarations; Review 1's extra 'out-of-scope for EffectiveBounds' claim is orthogonal to api-design and does not change the resulting PR.
